description: A technical diving instructor needs to correct the gas mix recorded for dive #2 in the dive log at /home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf. The dive was performed using Trimix 21/35 (21% Oxygen, 35% Helium), but it was recorded as air. Update the gas mixture of the first cylinder on dive #2 to 21% Oxygen and 35% Helium, and save the changes to the file.
